description: HireSignal Scoring Schema - Locked per Step 0 Requirements

technical_depth.name: Technical Depth
technical_depth.description: Problem-solving approach, architecture reasoning, debugging capability, production experience

authenticity.name: Authenticity
authenticity.description: Contradiction analysis, response consistency, specificity, timeline validation, AI usage detection

english_proficiency.name: English Proficiency
english_proficiency.description: Response time, vocabulary, grammar, comprehension, complex idea expression

behavioral_fit.name: Behavioral/Cultural Fit
behavioral_fit.description: Ownership mentality, initiative, adaptability, culture alignment (varies by JD culture_factor)

cognitive_flexibility.name: Cognitive Flexibility
cognitive_flexibility.description: Handles ambiguity, adapts approach, considers multiple perspectives, recovers from mistakes

pressure_resilience.name: Pressure Resilience
pressure_resilience.description: Handles stress, maintains composure, problem-solving under pressure

culture_specific.name: Culture-Specific Fit
culture_specific.description: Startup bias (action/ambiguity), Leadership (delegation/vision), Corporate (process/stakeholders), Remote (communication/autonomy), Collaborative (teamwork/conflict)

fit.condition: overall_score >= threshold AND no CRITICAL dealbreakers

pass_hold.condition: overall_score >= threshold AND has CRITICAL warnings (non-dealbreaker)

not_fit.condition: overall_score < threshold OR has CRITICAL dealbreaker

dealbreakers.name: Core Timeline/Location Mismatch
dealbreakers.description: Fundamental contradiction in timeline, location, or role

dealbreakers.name: Unreachable After 3 Attempts
dealbreakers.description: Candidate cannot be reached after 3 contact attempts - disqualify

dealbreakers.name: Abandons Interview Mid-Process
dealbreakers.description: Candidate abandons call or interview mid-process - disqualify

dealbreakers.name: English Proficiency Below Threshold
dealbreakers.description: English score below job requirement (default: 7) - disqualify based on JD threshold

CRITICAL.definition: Core contradiction that fundamentally questions reliability
examples: Location conflict (different stories about where they worked)
Skill dishonesty (claims skill but cannot demonstrate)
Skill claim vs demonstrated ability discrepancy
WARNING.impact: Flag for review, affects authenticity score

NOTE.definition: Minor variation expected in human memory/storytelling
examples: Contextual differences in how story is told

evidence_structure.reasoning: Why this quote supports the score

report_output.security: Internal staff only - do not share with candidates

weight_adjustment_rules.description: Per-JD weight customization based on role requirements

adjustment_example.scenario: Startup role prioritizes culture fit over english
